issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and pre-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were being enrolled in duplicate task sequences across multiple workflows, causing HAs and TCs to receive the same tasks twice. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. Madelaine worked with HubSpot support to resolve the filter issue.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close out the duplicate tasks to avoid double follow-up.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks for deals that had already been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow lacked the correct exit filters to suppress tasks upon those deal stage changes. Madelaine made a tweak to the workflow filters to resolve this.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any lingering check-in tasks for deals that were marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change on deal
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails to the agent continued to display the previous LO's information instead of the updated one. The fix was handled by Luis on the product side. The specific root cause was not stated.
issues.workaround: For deals where the LO was changed during the impact window, manually resend the agent introduction email with the correct LO information.

issues.title: TC workflow not triggering on Offer Accepted when deal stage had previously been reset
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then reverted to an earlier stage, and then moved back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger on the second Offer Accepted update. The root cause was that 'deal stage = Offer Accepted' was not listed as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. Madelaine added it as a re-enrollment trigger to fix the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that were flipped back to Offer Accepted a second time during the impact window to ensure TCs receive their tasks.

issues.title: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals being updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering enrollment into the TC workflow, meaning TCs were not receiving their tasks for these deals. HAs were manually sending closing info emails in the interim. Madelaine spoke with HubSpot support and the issue was confirmed fixed, though the exact root cause was not disclosed.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals that were updated to Offer Accepted during the impact window into the TC workflow to ensure closing tasks are completed.
